g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a raw FHIR ExplanationOfBenefit look like?')
g.text: FHIR R4 EOB JSON or SynPUF CSV row

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens during FHIR to pipeline conversion?')
g.text: extract CPT · ICD · NPI · POS · amount

sendPrompt('How does the rule engine score a claim?')
g.text: NCCI pair check · MUE limit check
